component.name: Caliber
component.summary: Graphical calculator — Basic, Scientific, Programming, Graphing and more

description.p: Caliber is a full-featured graphical calculator built with C++ and Qt6. It covers every calculation mode you need — from basic arithmetic to 3D function graphing — in a clean, themeable interface.

ul.li: Basic, Scientific, Programming, Date, Conversion, Equations, Graphing modes
2D and 3D function plotter with zoom, pan and rotation
8 built-in themes including Dark, Dracula, Nord, Monokai and Solarized
